chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ فِيهِ التَّعْزِيرُ فِي جَمِيعِ الْحُدُودِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 48 – Regarding what the discretion is Obligated in the entirety of the Penalties

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ

text: آكِلُ الْمَيْتَةِ وَ الدَّمِ وَ لَحْمِ الْخِنْزِيرِ عَلَيْهِ أَدَبٌ فَإِنْ عَادَ أُدِّبَ فَإِنْ عَادَ أُدِّبَ وَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ حَدٌّ .

en.hubeali: And by this chain, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The consumer of the dead (animals, fish etc.), and the blood, and the flesh of the swine, upon him is the disciplining. So if he repeats, he is disciplined. So if he repeats, he is disciplined, and there is no Penalty (Hadd) upon him’.
